reviews.review_description: this game has a very realistic feel to it when you use the realistic settings it's super fun i hope they keep developing it and add more courses and new discs. as it stands totally worth the 15 bucks great job

Good game the throwing sensitivity and mechanics need work. The amount of mental effort needed to throw a disc flat is exhausting. Even if I keep it level, the disc will fly but it will be sideways in flight but still somehow "flying". While putting, power seems all over the place. Sometimes you toss it lightly and it will fly 60ft and sometimes it'll only go 12ft. Kind of frustrating to play at the moment. I frolf irl regularly and was hoping this game was a rainy day alternative but its got a ways to go until the flight mechanics are realistic.

My friend and I are having a blast with this game. The mechanics seem pretty good as far as throwing goes. 
However, the ability to adjust yourself within your VR boundary needs some work. If I orientate myself in the direction and place I want in my boundary, it will place me facing the wrong way when I hold the A button. I’ll be on the opposite side of the disk box and trying to move myself with the controller makes it reset. Also in one game I am on top of everything. The aerial flight view of my disk is behind me and I have to quickly back up in my room to see it. This could pose a problem for smaller playing spaces

One major suggestion for the developer is to PLEASE MAKE A PRACTICE RANGE FOR US TO PRACTICE THROWING. I don’t want to have to play a game to practice. Basically just make a disk driving range. That would be perfect!

￼update: Now there is a new game called disc frenzy that is so much better than this one so I hope this app updates or it will become obsolete!!

My good buddy bought me this game, which completely excited me since I suck at disc golf in real life. My buddy plays all the time to which me and him both have come to the agreement that it is an amazing app in terms of accuracy of throwing BUT 


1. Lack of updates: with maps, new discs, and graphics

 
2. The out of bounds for every map is way too close, especially when you compare it to any other disc golf settings in real life and even professional disc golf places. The out of bounds just simply makes it more difficult to have a fair game whenever you take a point just for being 5 feet outside of bounds when in reality you’re only 40 feet away from the hole.

3. When using the watch it is not user friendly in terms of attempting to view it and also pushing the buttons on the watch/screen to where it is common among myself and others that it double taps an option one if attempting to choose. 
    

      Developers, if you could please consider making some changes to these two things would be greatly appreciated! Thank you!!

I have tried almost all of the Disc Golf games for Meta Quest and I feel that this one is the BEST!

I base my opinion on realistic disc flight and, almost as important, the feeling of being on an actual disc golf course. The flight of the mid range and driver discs are virtually perfect. I like the putting practice basket along with the practice driving range just below it.

It seems like the developers haven't made any changes or updates for a while now and that's OK as long as they have not abandoned the project. I really have no criticism of the game play as a whole. The fact that you can 'warp' to your next shot OR just walk using the joystick is excellent. If I was in a huge empty park I believe I could physically walk it as well.

If the dev's are still thinking of adding to the game, the only improvement I can think of is to allow the end user to 'calibrate' the way they putt. This is only needed on the "realistic" setting. I personally find that the putter flies a bit too high and far based on the way I throw in real life. I don't know if it is something that could be added or user calibrated since I'm not a programmer. In my head I see that a person would go into a putt calibration mode and then adjust where they figure the disc height and distance would end up, in real life, based on a number of throws from a fixed distance. Then have another fixed distance to throw from and calibrate again. Possibly 30 feet away, then 20 feet and finally  further away like 50 feet.  I'm just throwing it out there (pardon the pun).

Regardless, this is a MUST HAVE for any disc golfer that wants to play during not so favourable weather or just wants to play something that's almost identical to real life disc golf.

Thank you for such a 'true to life' simulation of my favourite sport.
Really good game. 5 stars. Very well done. Just like real thing putting is tricky but I’m getting better at it. 400 foot drives down hill with draw or fade. It’s got it all
Went through the ground and was forever falling. Very buggy. I would pay a lot for a new disc golf game. A modern one.
The game looks good. The release points and tilt of the disc upon release is so wrong that I feel this will ruin my real game. Very frustrating to try to play when it reacts so wrongly.

About as close to real as you can expect from a game. Physics on fade can use a little work but overall very good, highly recommend! For 25% off this and many other games check my bio for a link!

link tr.ee /Helarlash  (no spaces)

reviews.review_title: Love the concept, physics need work
reviews.review_description: All in all it’s a great game and I love the idea of it and work out in. That being said discs do not throw or perform accurately half of the time. Power is way off and inconsistent.  Putting I can throw the same disc, same way and it might go 10 ft or 90 ft. Some of the out of bounds could be adjusted to be less harsh and narrow(some holes have the out of bounds going through the tee box) Realistic power is way too strong, power scale needs adjusted.   Discs should curve throwing hyzer or anhyzer and they either don’t or don’t accurately. Tomahawk throw doesn’t work at all even though it says tomahawk. Rollers barely move.  Love disc golf and play 1-2 times a week, with this game I get to play more.  So would love to see the physics fixed. Would love to see a “mulligan” option so when the game doesn’t hoses you on a throw you can erase that throw.  Would like to change putting options (turbo putt option would be nice).

Having a great time playing this game. Never tried it IRL.  

I think the only improvement now would be to add wild life every now and then. We can hear the birds and mosquitoes, but it would be cool to see a rabbit, deer, gopher,  squirrel and see the birds to make it even more immersive.

This app is very well done. It recreates the atmosphere of the game of disc golf almost perfectly. Obviously some concessions had to be made because you are waving a game controller indoors and not a throwing a disc outdoors, but the feel is consistent. You’ll be making the same choices on disc selection and shot type as you would be out on a real course. You just wont need to worry about wind, snakes, or carrying a disc retriever to get your disc out of the lake.

Controls are pretty good.  Like any video game, just find a way that works.  I am predominantly forehand in my real life  play.  I am on here too, however, I can't throw a forehand the normal way on here, so I found a way to make it work and make it enjoyable.  The graphics are very blocky but no horrible, and this isn't realistic enough to make you better in real life, but it's a ton of fun.  I especially like when you are standing on a sheer cliff face looking 100 ft down at the basket.  Download and have fun with it.

I really enjoy playing this graphics are pretty decent and the overall gameplay is pretty dang spot on it throw the disc very realistic and even the chains on the basket swing back and forth when you putt it’s pretty sweet I like this game there a bunch of different courses too gotta check it out!!

reviews.review_title: Best VR disc golf game by far
reviews.review_description: I am very much enjoying this game so far.  I played the demo courses and immediately paid for the full version.  Easy decision for me.  I actually have a 9 hole course on my Texas property and I wanted a way to play on windy days (most days here) and this fits the bill.  My 4 stars is due to some small things I would like to see changed.  Mostly in multi-player mode.  I wish you could just click the move to next shot like you can in single player. (I live in a tiny house so it's nice to just click the button and have it line me up for my next shot.  Less likely to punch the TV. LOL)  I also noticed that when two of us had a disc very close to the basket, twice it put me at the opposite side of the goal where my wife's disc had landed.  Minor issues tho.  If I were rating it compared to the other disc golf games available for the Quest it would get 10 out of 5 stars for sure.

Great game. I need more courses. I play it multiple times a week, especially on days I wanted to play disc golf in real life but weather or work didn’t permit it that day. Would like more disc options and bag option and courses in future.
I love this game it wish it would get more updates!

I'd love a sequel or expansion pack
 to this game!
Great course design! Great disc design! Love playing multiplayer! Great music in the trailer!

This game surprised me in the best of ways. Once you get over the minor learning curve for  understanding the controls, this game really takes off. Multiplayer with friends is incredibly fun, but the most satisfying feature is the lifelike basket and chains. Hitting a put no matter the distance just feels realistic. Nice work to the devs, looking forward to what they have planned for future advancements.
